toast.source: Group-level Daily Performance Summary 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group - Saturday, July 4' (delivered Jul 5 6:22 AM PT), parsed at Sun Jul 5 ~7:15 AM run. Location-level email not yet delivered; labor $ and discount $ derived from percentages.
toast.note: Sat Jul 4 (Independence Day) GROUP summary delivered 6:22 AM PT Jul 5: Net $3,829.55 / Gross $3,958.40 / 188 guests / 112 orders / Avg $34.19 per order, $20.37 per guest / Labor 22.8% of net (~$873 derived) / Discounts 3.3% of gross (~$131 derived) / 7 void items / $0 refunds / $0 gift cards. NOTABLY SOFT for a Saturday holiday: net is -61.9% vs Fri Jul 3 ($10,051.43) -- consistent with the light early roster (10 emp / 41.57 hrs, last shift 6:30P). SDLW comparison not available from group email. Location-level email (with exact labor/discount $) pending; Sun Jul 5 summary expected tomorrow ~6:30-7:40 AM PT.

yesterday.note: LIVE Chrome scrape Sun Jul 5 ~7:10 AM PT, 'Yesterday' = Jul 4 (Independence Day). Cost $64.88 (down $5.21 vs Jul 3 $70.09), 12,207 impr (+1,189), 231 clicks (+12), CTR 1.89%, Avg CPC $0.28, conversions 0.00 (shown as 'calculating projections'). Account-level 'Protect your account from unauthorized activity' banner STILL displayed -- verify. New in-UI recommendation: raising 'Local store visits and promotions-Performance Max-2' budget could increase weekly conversions by 92.49 (campaign flagged 'Limited by budget').

googleAds.reportsNote: Sat Jul 4 4 AM run: 2 Google Ads report-ready emails in last 24h (Brewhouse Daily Campaign Report; Campaign performance). No disapproval or budget-alert emails. Figures below carried from Fri Jul 3 live scrape.

disapprovals.detail: Previously Disapproved (Destination not working HTTP 404 iOS + Copyrighted content, Jun 9). As of the Sat Jun 27 live scrape this campaign is fully 'Eligible' (no longer Limited) and served Jun 26 (913 impr, 38 clicks, $26.72). Appears fully recovered; confirm destination URL fix held.

googleAds.note_jul5: Sun Jul 5 4 AM run (email-only): 2 Google Ads report-ready notifications received Jul 4 ('Campaign performance' 5:31 AM PT, 'Brewhouse Daily Campaign Report' 8:48 AM PT). No disapproval or budget alerts in last 24h. Live dashboard NOT re-scraped this run; campaign/spend figures below are as of Sat Jul 4 ~7 AM. Open items carried forward: 'unauthorized activity' banner + new billing user (verify), World Cup HQ 2026 paused-but-spending (verify).

billingPeriod.label: Jul 1 - Jul 4, 2026
billingPeriod.note: Billing period Jul 1-Jul 4, 2026: ad spend $57.38 (+$10.14 vs Jul 1-3), Avg CPC $1.02, Avg CPL $3.19. LIVE from Yelp Ads dashboard Sun Jul 5 ~7:12 AM.

yelpAds.note: Sun Jul 5 ~7:12 AM LIVE Chrome scrape. Last 30d: 33.9k ad impr (76% of 44.4k), 427 ad clicks, 539 ad page visits (59% of 921), 132 ad leads (68% of 195). Billing period Jul 1-Jul 4 = $57.38 spend / $1.02 CPC / $3.19 CPL. 12mo: Ads 1,042 leads (61%) / Organic 672 (39%) / Total 1,714; breakdown: 742 directions/map, 114 calls, 834 website visits, 24 CTA clicks; forecast 170. Bonus-budget module not shown on dashboard this run.
